_comment: Bomb (battle_bom_spr.bin). Tiers (Bomb/Grenade/Exploder) = palettes 0/1/2. Primary = the whole fiery body ramp, indices 3-9 (dark->light), CONFIRMED in-editor. Outline (1), eye glint (2) and sparse detail (10-15) left unthemed. Single section, so presets stay single-color. shadeMode uniformHue.
